name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical store locations across multiple states.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical storefronts nationwide, providing short-term lending and cash access solutions to consumers who need immediate funds. The company specializes in emergency cash products including installment loans, title loans, and check cashing services, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional banking for time-sensitive financial needs. ACE differentiates itself through an extensive network of physical locations, multiple service channels (in-store and online), and a diverse product lineup that extends beyond just payday loans to include bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services. However, the company operates in the high-cost lending space with products that typically carry substantial fees and interest rates; consumers should understand that while ACE provides rapid access to cash, the cost of borrowing is significantly higher than traditional banks, and product availability varies substantially by state—as evidenced by their messaging that certain loan types are not available in specific states.
address: 1335 W Brandon Blvd F, Brandon, FL 33511

company_info.headquarters: 1335 W Brandon Blvd F, Brandon, FL 33511

pros: Multiple service locations available for in-person transactions and immediate assistance
Diverse product offerings beyond payday loans including title loans, installment loans, and check cashing
Online loan application option available for customers who prefer digital channels
Money transfer and bill payment services available in addition to lending products
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Tax preparation services offered at physical locations
Established brand with dedicated customer service phone lines and email support
cons: Significant fees and interest rates typical of emergency lending products, making borrowing expensive
Product availability highly restricted by state—many loan types unavailable in certain jurisdictions including some Colorado locations
Website navigation issues and broken location pages create difficulty finding specific store information and service details
No transparent pricing information visible on website content provided; customers must visit stores or call for rates
Physical store dependency limits accessibility for customers in areas without nearby locations
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash within 24 hours for unexpected emergencies
Vehicle owners with access to title loans who need rapid collateral-based lending
Unbanked or underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank credit products
Customers needing check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services alongside lending
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who have access to a physical location and need funds within 24 hours. The critical caveat is that their products carry high costs; borrowers should exhaust all other options first, as the fees and interest rates substantially exceed traditional banking alternatives, making ACE a last-resort emergency solution rather than a sustainable financial strategy.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
